markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Brainstorming Q1 content initiatives and advanced growth projects.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Q1 Content Initiative:** A data-driven report on a key pain point (e.g., app access) will launch in Feb 2025 to support a new campaign, providing a high-value asset beyond standard blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [**Advanced Growth Projects:** Two "blue sky" projects were discussed for Q1: an ROI calculator and an interactive product demo. GrowthX will investigate internal feasibility and cost.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [**Q1 Strategic Analysis:** A competitive gap analysis is planned to counter anticipated marketing pushes from competitors like Serval, who recently started paid ads.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Refinement:** The successful cluster strategy will be enhanced by adding customer quotes to blog posts, boosting E-E-A-T and trust.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)

## Topics

### Q1 Content & Campaign Support

  - [**Goal:** Create a high-value asset to support a Q1 campaign focused on a core pain point: app access and automated onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [**Asset Idea:** A data-driven report (e.g., white paper, trend report) based on Siit's internal data.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provides a unique, non-blog asset for lead generation and strengthens SEO by offering proprietary insights.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Target launch is February 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Action:** Carmel will provide Matt with available internal data (e.g., top integrations, key requests) for analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)

### Advanced Growth Projects

  - [**ROI Calculator:** A tool to calculate time/cost savings from using Siit.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Leverages the success of existing tools, which are a major traffic driver.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [**Inspiration:** Ramp's "growth tools" section.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [**Interactive Product Demo:** A landing page where users can select their tech stack (e.g., Slack, GitHub) to see a custom workflow simulation.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provides a dynamic, personalized product experience, inspired by Vapi's custom agent builder.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [**Status:** Both are "blue sky" ideas requiring a custom add-on to the partnership. Matt will investigate GrowthX's internal capabilities and cost.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)

### Q1 Strategic Analysis & Content Refresh

  - [**Competitive Gap Analysis:** A deep dive into competitor marketing strategies is planned for Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To proactively counter anticipated marketing pushes, especially from Serval, who recently started paid ad campaigns (Nov 28, 2024).](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [**Content Cluster Refresh:** GrowthX is already scoping a refresh of the Service Desk and AI content clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
      - [**Goal:** Tighten clusters by eliminating redundant topics and creating a clear TOFU → MOFU → BOFU user journey.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Expand into industry-specific content (e.g., ITSM for Healthcare) to capture high-intent, low-volume traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [**Customer Proof in Content:** A new initiative to add customer quotes to blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Boosts E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness) and provides tangible proof points without requiring full case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carmel:**](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
      - [Provide Matt with internal data for the Q1 report.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
      - [Define specs for the ROI calculator.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Create a shortlist of key competitors for the Q1 analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
      - [Investigate GrowthX's capabilities and cost for the ROI calculator and interactive demo.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
      - [Consult with Jacob (GrowthX Director) on advanced project strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
      - [Research keywords from Carmel's "article inspo" list.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
      - [Provide best practices for incorporating customer quotes into content.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
      - [Meet again in early January 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/9FPHSXwJbCfz_mwZV6ahcJUkaztotygZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
